user.title: Add an IR humidifier
user.description: Pick which IR transmitter should send commands to this humidifier and give it a name. If you have several Broadlinks or ESPHome blasters, choose the one in the same room.

error.transmitter_unavailable: That transmitter is no longer available.

abort.no_emitters: No IR transmitters are configured in Home Assistant. Set up a Broadlink (or ESPHome IR blaster) first, then try again.
